data.title: HVAC Insufficient Cooling Troubleshooting Guide
data.content: Common causes of insufficient HVAC cooling include: 1) Insufficient or leaking refrigerant; 2) Clogged air filter; 3) Dust accumulation on evaporator or condenser; 4) Compressor failure; 5) Thermostat malfunction. It is recommended to check the filter and refrigerant level first; if the problem persists, contact a professional engineer for diagnosis.
data.author: Alex Chen

data.title: Billing FAQ
data.content: Answers to common billing questions: 1) Quote validity period is 30 days; 2) Bank transfer and online payment are supported; 3) Annual maintenance plans can be paid annually or quarterly; 4) Emergency repair fees include call-out fee and labor fee; 5) Repairs within the warranty period are free.
data.author: Sam Lee

data.title: Emergency Repair Process
data.content: Emergency repair service process: 1) Call the 24-hour emergency hotline; 2) Customer service confirms the fault and creates a ticket; 3) Dispatched to an engineer within 15 minutes; 4) Engineer arrives on-site within 4 hours; 5) On-site diagnosis and repair; 6) Submit service report. Annual maintenance customers enjoy priority emergency response.
data.author: Alex Chen

data.title: Annual Maintenance Plan Pricing and Contents
data.content: The standard price of the annual maintenance plan is 9800 CNY/year, with a 1000 CNY discount during the summer promotion (8800 CNY/year). Includes: 4 on-site inspections, filter replacement, priority emergency response, detailed service report and operation training. Applicable to commercial HVAC systems. Can be paid annually or quarterly.
data.author: Sam Lee

data.title: Warranty Policy Explanation
data.content: Warranty policy: 1) Newly installed equipment enjoys 12 months free warranty; 2) Warranty coverage includes manufacturing defects and failures under normal use; 3) Warranty does not cover damage caused by man-made damage, improper operation and external factors; 4) Replaced parts after repair enjoy 90 days warranty; 5) Free on-site repair within warranty period, standard fees apply outside warranty.
data.author: Sam Lee

data.name: Urgent SLA
data.description: Applies to urgent priority tickets, response within 1 hour, resolution within 4 hours. 7x24 hour service.

data.name: High Priority SLA
data.description: Applies to high priority tickets, response within 4 hours, resolution within 8 hours. Business hours service.

data.name: Standard SLA
data.description: Applies to medium and low priority tickets, response within 24 hours, resolution within 72 hours. Business hours service.
